content:
本文基于对 nccl\src\ras 的源码分析，master commit b17addf19bd427f349d262d7734cebde33ea992e，深入阐述NCCL的RAS处理机制。

一、RAS系统概述

1.1 核心目标

NCCL RAS系统是一个专门设计用于提高分布式通信可靠性的子系统，主要功能包括:

  • 故障检测 (Reliability): 实时监控节点健康状态，检测网络故障和节点失效
  • 高可用性 (Availability): 通过故障转移和冗余连接保证系统持续运行
  • 可维护性 (Serviceability): 提供诊断工具和运行时状态查询能力

1.2 架构特点

  1. 独立线程: 每个进程一个RAS线程，独立于NCCL通信主流程
  2. 环形拓扑: 基于ring topology构建骨干网络
  3. 事件驱动: 使用poll()实现高效的事件循环
  4. 异步通信: 所有网络操作均为非阻塞异步模式
  5. 多级超时: 从警告到错误，逐级升级的超时策略

1.3 RAS网络架构图

+------------------+
                    |   RAS Thread     |
                    |                  |
                    |  +------------+  |
                    |  | Event Loop |<----------+
                    |  +------------+  |        |
                    +------------------+        |
                              |                 |
                    +---------v---------+       |
                    |                   |       |
                    |  RAS Network      |       |
                    |  (Ring Topology)  |       |
                    |                   |       |
                    +---------+---------+       |
                              |                 |
         +--------------------+-----------------+--------------------+
         |                    |                 |                    |
+--------v-------+  +---------v--------+ +------v---------+ +-------v--------+
|  Node A        |  |  Node B          | |  Node C        | |  Node N        |
|                |  |                  | |                | |                |
| +------------+ |  | +--------------+ | | +------------+ | | +------------+ |
| |Next Link   |<---->|Next Link     |<--->|Next Link   |<--->|Next Link   | |
| |            |----->|              |---->|            |---->|            | |
| |Prev Link   |<---->|Prev Link     |<--->|Prev Link   |<--->|Prev Link   | |
| +------------+ |  | +--------------+ | | +------------+ | | +------------+ |
+----------------+  +------------------+ +----------------+ +----------------+

Fallback Connections:
If primary connection fails, RAS creates fallback connections:
Node A -----> Node B (Primary)
Node A -----> Node C -----> Node B (Fallback path)

二、核心数据结构

2.1 节点类型 (ras_internal.h)

// RAS消息类型
typedef enum {
  RAS_MSG_CONNINIT = 1,      // 连接初始化
  RAS_MSG_CONNINITACK = 2,   // 连接确认
  RAS_MSG_KEEPALIVE = 3,      // 保活消息
  RAS_MSG_PEERSUPDATE = 4,    // 对等节点更新
  RAS_MSG_COLLREQ = 5,        // 集合操作请求
  RAS_MSG_COLLRESP = 6,       // 集合操作响应
} rasMsgType;

// RAS集合操作类型
typedef enum {
  RAS_MSG_NONE = 0,
  RAS_BC_DEADPEER = 1,        // 广播: 节点失效
  // 1000以上为集合操作
  RAS_COLL_CONNS = 1001,      // 收集连接信息
  RAS_COLL_COMMS = 1002,      // 收集通信器信息
} rasCollectiveType;

2.2 连接管理 (ras_internal.h:349-393)

// RAS连接描述符
struct rasConnection {
  struct rasConnection* next, *prev;
  
  union ncclSocketAddress addr;  // 对端地址
  struct rasSocket* sock;         // 当前使用的socket
  
  // 对端哈希值缓存(避免不必要的peers交换)
  uint64_t lastSentPeersHash;
  uint64_t lastRecvPeersHash;
  uint64_t lastSentDeadPeersHash;
  uint64_t lastRecvDeadPeersHash;
  
  // 发送队列
  struct ncclIntruQueue<struct rasMsgMeta, &rasMsgMeta::next> sendQ;
  
  // 超时追踪
  int64_t startRetryTime;         // 重试开始时间
  int64_t lastRetryTime;          // 最后重试时间
  
  bool experiencingDelays;        // 是否经历延迟
  
  // 统计信息
  int64_t travelTimeMin;
  int64_t travelTimeMax;
  int64_t travelTimeSum;
  int64_t travelTimeCount;
};

2.3 Socket状态机 (ras_internal.h:395-427)

// Socket状态
typedef enum {
  RAS_SOCK_CLOSED = 0,       // 已关闭
  RAS_SOCK_CONNECTING = 1,   // 正在连接
  RAS_SOCK_HANDSHAKE = 2,    // 握手阶段
  RAS_SOCK_READY = 3,        // 就绪状态
  RAS_SOCK_TERMINATING = 4   // 正在终止
} rasSocketStatus;

// Socket描述符
struct rasSocket {
  struct rasSocket* next, *prev;
  struct ncclSocket sock;         // 底层socket
  
  rasSocketStatus status;
  int pfd;                        // poll fd索引
  struct rasConnection* conn;     // 对应的连接
  
  int64_t createTime;
  int64_t lastSendTime;
  int64_t lastRecvTime;
  
  // 接收缓冲
  int recvOffset;
  int recvLength;
  struct rasMsg* recvMsg;
};

2.4 Socket连接生命周期图

+----------------+
                | RAS_SOCK_CLOSED |
                +--------+-------+
                         |
                         | rasConnOpen()
                         v
               +-------------------+
               | RAS_SOCK_CONNECTING |
               +---------+---------+
                         |
                         | Connection established
                         v
               +-------------------+
               | RAS_SOCK_HANDSHAKE |
               +---------+---------+
                         |
                         | Handshake completed
                         v
                 +---------------+
                 | RAS_SOCK_READY |
                 +-------+-------+
                         |
                         | Connection issues/Timeout
                         v
            +------------------------+
            | RAS_SOCK_TERMINATING   |
            +-----------+------------+
                        |
                        | Shutdown complete
                        v
               +----------------+
               | RAS_SOCK_CLOSED |
               +----------------+

2.4 链路管理 (ras_internal.h:318-345)

// 链路连接条目
struct rasLinkConn {
  struct rasLinkConn* next;
  int peerIdx;                    // 对等节点索引
  struct rasConnection* conn;     // 连接指针
  bool external;                  // 是否为外部请求的fallback
};

// RAS骨干链路
struct rasLink {
  int direction;                  // 1: nextLink, -1: prevLink
  struct rasLinkConn* conns;      // 连接列表(首个为主连接，其余为fallback)
  int64_t lastUpdatePeersTime;    // 最后更新时间
};

// 全局链路
extern struct rasLink rasNextLink;   // direction = 1
extern struct rasLink rasPrevLink;   // direction = -1

三、超时策略

3.1 超时常量定义 (ras_internal.h:186-221)

// 保活间隔: 1秒
#define RAS_KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL (1*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 保活超时警告: 5秒
#define RAS_KEEPALIVE_TIMEOUT_WARN (5*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 保活超时错误/Socket卡住: 20秒
#define RAS_STUCK_TIMEOUT (20*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 连接重试间隔: 1秒
#define RAS_CONNECT_RETRY (1*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 连接警告: 5秒
#define RAS_CONNECT_WARN RAS_KEEPALIVE_TIMEOUT_WARN

// 空闲连接超时: 60秒
#define RAS_IDLE_TIMEOUT (60*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 节点失效判定: 60秒
#define RAS_PEER_DEAD_TIMEOUT (60*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*ncclParamRasTimeoutFactor())

// 集合操作单跳超时: 5秒
#define RAS_COLLECTIVE_LEG_TIMEOUT (RAS_COLLECTIVE_LEG_TIMEOUT_SEC*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*...)

// 集合操作额外超时: 5秒
#define RAS_COLLECTIVE_EXTRA_TIMEOUT (RAS_COLLECTIVE_EXTRA_TIMEOUT_SEC*CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC*...)

3.2 超时处理层次

级别1: 保活间隔 (1秒)
  └─> 定期发送保活消息

级别2: 警告超时 (5秒)
  ├─> 保活超时: 尝试替代连接
  └─> 连接超时: 启动fallback连接

级别3: 错误超时 (20秒)
  ├─> Socket卡住: 终止并重建socket
  └─> 初始化超时: 强制终止socket

级别4: 节点失效 (60秒)
  └─> 宣告节点死亡，广播通知所有节点

四、初始化流程

4.1 入口函数 (ras.cc:87-145)

ncclResult_t ncclRasCommInit(struct ncclComm* comm, struct rasRankInit* myRank) {
  // 1. 首次初始化(全局单例)
  if (!rasInitialized) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(rasInitMutex);
    if (!rasInitialized) {
      // 创建RAS网络监听socket(随机端口)
      NCCLCHECK(ncclSocketInit(&rasNetListeningSocket, &addr, 
                               NCCL_SOCKET_MAGIC, ncclSocketTypeRasNetwork,
                               nullptr, /*asyncFlag*/1));
      NCCLCHECK(ncclSocketListen(&rasNetListeningSocket));
      
      // 创建客户端监听socket
      (void)rasClientInitSocket();
      
      // 创建通知管道(NCCL线程 -> RAS线程)
      SYSCHECKGOTO(pipe(rasNotificationPipe), "pipe", ret, fail);
      
      // 启动RAS线程
      PTHREADCHECK(pthread_create(&rasThread, nullptr, &rasThreadMain, nullptr));
      ncclSetThreadName(rasThread, "NCCL RAS");
      
      rasInitialized = true;
      atexit(rasTerminate);
    }
  }
  
  // 2. 注册communicator
  {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(ncclCommsMutex);
    ncclComms[freeSlot] = comm;
    ncclCommsSorted = false;
  }
  
  // 3. 返回RAS监听地址
  memcpy(&myRank->addr, &rasNetListeningSocket.addr, sizeof(myRank->addr));
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

4.2 RAS线程主循环 (ras.cc:586-682)

static void* rasThreadMain(void*) {
  // 初始化poll文件描述符
  rasPfds[0].fd = rasNotificationPipe[0];     // 本地通知管道
  rasPfds[1].fd = rasNetListeningSocketFd;    // RAS网络监听
  rasPfds[2].fd = rasClientListeningSocket;   // 客户端监听
  
  // 主事件循环
  for (int64_t nextWakeup=0;;) {
    int timeout = calculateTimeout(nextWakeup);
    int nEvents = poll(rasPfds, nRasPfds, timeout);
    
    nextWakeup = clockNano()+CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC;
    
    // 1. 处理poll事件
    for (int pollIdx = 0; pollIdx < nRasPfds && nEvents > 0; pollIdx++) {
      if (rasPfds[pollIdx].revents) {
        if (fd == rasNotificationPipe[0]) {
          // 本地NCCL线程通知
          rasLocalHandle(&terminate);
          if (terminate) goto exit;
        } else if (fd == rasNetListeningSocketFd) {
          // 新RAS连接
          rasNetAcceptNewSocket();
        } else if (fd == rasClientListeningSocket) {
          // 新客户端连接
          rasClientAcceptNewSocket();
        } else {
          // RAS socket或client socket事件
          rasSockEventLoop(sock, pollIdx);
          // OR rasClientEventLoop(client, pollIdx);
        }
      }
    }
    
    // 2. 处理超时
    now = clockNano();
    rasSocksHandleTimeouts(now, &nextWakeup);    // Socket超时
    rasConnsHandleTimeouts(now, &nextWakeup);    // 连接超时
    rasNetHandleTimeouts(now, &nextWakeup);      // 网络超时
    rasCollsHandleTimeouts(now, &nextWakeup);    // 集合操作超时
  }
  
exit:
  rasThreadCleanup();
  return nullptr;
}

五、故障检测机制

5.1 保活消息 (rasnet.cc)

static void rasConnSendKeepAlive(struct rasConnection* conn, bool nack) {
  struct rasMsg* msg;
  int msgLen = rasMsgLength(RAS_MSG_KEEPALIVE);
  
  rasMsgAlloc(&msg, msgLen);
  msg->type = RAS_MSG_KEEPALIVE;
  msg->keepAlive.peersHash = rasPeersHash;
  msg->keepAlive.deadPeersHash = rasDeadPeersHash;
  msg->keepAlive.linkMask = calculateLinkMask(conn);
  clock_gettime(CLOCK_REALTIME, &msg->keepAlive.realTime);
  msg->keepAlive.nack = nack;
  
  rasConnEnqueueMsg(conn, msg, msgLen);
}

保活消息触发时机:

  1. 连接初始化完成后
  2. 距离上次发送超过RAS_KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL (1秒)
  3. 检测到peers hash不匹配时

5.2 Peer发现与更新机制

在RAS系统中，Peer发现是一个动态过程，当新的NCCL通信器被创建时，会触发Peer信息的更新和传播：

+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
|   NCCL Comm      |     |   RAS Thread     |     | Remote Peers     |
|   Initialization |     |                  |     |                  |
+--------+---------+     +--------+---------+     +--------+---------+
         |                        |                        |
         | 1. ncclRasAddRanks()   |                        |
         +----------------------->|                        |
         |                        |                        |
         |                        | 2. Convert to Peers    |
         |                        |    Info                |
         |                        |                        |
         |                        | 3. Update Local Peers  |
         |                        |    List                |
         |                        |                        |
         |                        | 4. Propagate to Links  |
         |                        +----------+-------------+
         |                                   |
         |                        +----------v-------------+
         |                        | Next/Prev Links        |
         |                        | (Ring Topology)        |
         |                        +----+-------------+-----+
         |                             |             |
         |                        +----v---+     +---v----+
         |                        | Node B |     | Node N |
         |                        +----+---+     +---+----+
         |                             |             |
         |                        +----v-------------v----+
         |                        | RAS_MSG_PEERSUPDATE   |
         |                        +----------+------------+
         |                                   |
         |                        +----------v------------+
         |                        | Remote Nodes Process  |
         |                        | and Update Peers List |
         |                        +-----------------------+
         |                                   |
         |                        +----------+------------+
         |                        | Send ACK/Confirmation |
         |                        +----------+------------+
         |                                   |
         |                        +----------v------------+
         |                        | Update Complete       |
         +<-----------------------+                       |
         |                        +-----------------------+

5.2 Socket超时处理 (rasnet.cc:415-470)

void rasSocksHandleTimeouts(int64_t now, int64_t* nextWakeup) {
  for (struct rasSocket* sock = rasSocketsHead; sock; sock = sockNext) {
    struct rasSocket* sockNext = sock->next;
    
    // 1. 连接建立超时 (STUCK_TIMEOUT = 20秒)
    if (sock->status == RAS_SOCK_CONNECTING || 
        sock->status == RAS_SOCK_HANDSHAKE) {
      if (now - sock->createTime > RAS_STUCK_TIMEOUT) {
        INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS init timeout error (%lds) on socket %s",
             (now-sock->createTime)/CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC, 
             ncclSocketToString(&sock->sock.addr, rasLine));
        rasSocketTerminate(sock, /*finalize*/true);
      }
    }
    
    // 2. 终止超时 (STUCK_TIMEOUT = 20秒)
    else if (sock->status == RAS_SOCK_TERMINATING) {
      if (now - std::max(sock->lastSendTime, sock->lastRecvTime) > RAS_STUCK_TIMEOUT) {
        INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS termination stuck timeout error (%lds)",
             (now-std::max(sock->lastSendTime, sock->lastRecvTime)) / CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC);
        rasSocketTerminate(sock, /*finalize*/true);
      }
    }
    
    // 3. 空闲超时 (IDLE_TIMEOUT = 60秒)
    else if (sock->status == RAS_SOCK_READY) {
      if (now - std::max(sock->lastSendTime, sock->lastRecvTime) > RAS_IDLE_TIMEOUT) {
        INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS idle timeout on socket %s", ...);
        rasSocketTerminate(sock);
      }
    }
  }
}

5.3 连接超时处理 (rasnet.cc:187-315)

void rasConnsHandleTimeouts(int64_t now, int64_t* nextWakeup) {
  for (struct rasConnection* conn = rasConnsHead; conn; conn = connNext) {
    struct rasConnection* connNext = conn->next;
    
    // 1. 连接重试 (CONNECT_RETRY = 1秒)
    if (conn->sock && conn->sock->status == RAS_SOCK_CONNECTING) {
      if (now - conn->sock->lastSendTime > RAS_CONNECT_RETRY) {
        // 检查连接是否准备好
        int ready;
        if (ncclSocketReady(&conn->sock->sock, &ready) != ncclSuccess) {
          rasSocketTerminate(conn->sock, /*finalize*/true);
        }
      }
    }
    
    // 2. 发送卡住超时 (STUCK_TIMEOUT = 20秒)
    if (!ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&conn->sendQ) && 
        conn->sock->status == RAS_SOCK_READY) {
      if (now - std::max(conn->sock->lastSendTime, 
                         ncclIntruQueueHead(&conn->sendQ)->enqueueTime) 
          > RAS_STUCK_TIMEOUT) {
        INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS send stuck timeout error (%lds)", ...);
        rasSocketTerminate(conn->sock, /*finalize*/false, RAS_STUCK_TIMEOUT);
      }
    }
    
    // 3. 连接警告 (CONNECT_WARN = 5秒)
    if (!conn->sock && conn->startRetryTime) {
      if (now - conn->startRetryTime > RAS_CONNECT_WARN) {
        if (!conn->experiencingDelays) {
          INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS connect timeout warning (%lds)", ...);
          
          // 启动fallback连接
          conn->experiencingDelays = true;
          (void)rasLinkAddFallback(&rasNextLink, conn);
          (void)rasLinkAddFallback(&rasPrevLink, conn);
          
          // 清除等待该连接的集合操作
          rasCollsPurgeConn(conn);
        }
      }
    }
    
    // 4. 节点失效判定 (PEER_DEAD_TIMEOUT = 60秒)
    if (conn->startRetryTime && 
        now - conn->startRetryTime > RAS_PEER_DEAD_TIMEOUT) {
      INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS peer dead timeout error (%lds) with %s",
           (now-conn->startRetryTime) / CLOCK_UNITS_PER_SEC, ...);
      rasConnDisconnect(&conn->addr);
      (void)rasPeerDeclareDead(&conn->addr);
    }
    
    // 5. 重新连接 (CONNECT_RETRY = 1秒)
    if (conn->sock == nullptr && 
        now - conn->lastRetryTime > RAS_CONNECT_RETRY) {
      INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS trying to reconnect with %s", ...);
      conn->lastRetryTime = now;
      rasConnOpen(conn);
    }
  }
}

六、故障恢复机制

6.1 Fallback连接 (rasnet.cc:885-975)

ncclResult_t rasLinkAddFallback(struct rasLink* link, 
                                 const struct rasConnection* conn) {
  // 1. 检查连接是否属于该link
  struct rasLinkConn* linkConn = rasLinkConnFind(link, conn, &linkIdx);
  if (!linkConn || linkConn->external) return ncclSuccess;
  
  // 2. 计算fallback peer
  int peerIdx = linkConn->peerIdx;
  int newPeerIdx;
  for (int attempt = 1; attempt < MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS; attempt++) {
    newPeerIdx = rasLinkCalculatePeer(link, peerIdx, /*isFallback*/true);
    
    // 检查该peer是否已死亡
    if (rasPeerIsDead(&rasPeers[newPeerIdx].addr)) continue;
    
    // 检查是否已有连接
    struct rasConnection* newConn = rasConnFind(&rasPeers[newPeerIdx].addr);
    if (newConn && newConn->experiencingDelays) {
      // 该fallback连接也有问题，继续寻找
      peerIdx = newPeerIdx;
      continue;
    }
    
    // 3. 添加fallback连接
    if (!newConn) {
      NCCLCHECK(rasConnCreate(&rasPeers[newPeerIdx].addr, &newConn));
    }
    NCCLCHECK(rasLinkConnAdd(link, newConn, newPeerIdx, 
                             /*pretend*/false, &linkIdx, &newLinkConn));
    
    INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS link %d: opening fallback connection %d with %s",
         link->direction, linkIdx, 
         ncclSocketToString(&rasPeers[newPeerIdx].addr, rasLine));
    
    break;
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

Fallback策略:

  1. 主连接出现延迟(5秒警告)时触发
  2. 沿ring方向寻找下一个活跃节点
  3. 跳过已死亡或正在经历延迟的节点
  4. 最多尝试MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS次
  5. Fallback连接与主连接并存，直到主连接恢复

6.1 Fallback连接机制图

主连接出现问题时的Fallback机制:

Node A -----------> Node B    (Primary connection, experiencing delays)
         \
          \        
           \-----> Node C -----> Node B    (Fallback path)
           
Fallback Connection Establishment Process:
1. Primary connection delay detected (5s timeout)
2. RAS system identifies fallback route
3. Establish new connection through intermediate node
4. Continue communication through fallback path
5. Monitor primary connection for recovery
6. Revert to primary when stable

6.2 节点失效广播 (ras.cc:539-552)

void rasMsgHandleBCDeadPeer(struct rasCollRequest** pReq, 
                             size_t* pReqLen, bool* pDone) {
  INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS handling deadPeer (addr %s)", 
       ncclSocketToString(&(*pReq)->deadPeer.addr, rasLine));
  
  *pReqLen = rasCollDataLength(RAS_BC_DEADPEER);
  
  if (!rasPeerIsDead(&(*pReq)->deadPeer.addr)) {
    // 1. 断开与该节点的所有连接
    rasConnDisconnect(&(*pReq)->deadPeer.addr);
    
    // 2. 标记节点为死亡
    (void)rasPeerDeclareDead(&(*pReq)->deadPeer.addr);
    
    // 3. 继续转发广播
    *pDone = false;
  } else {
    INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS already knew it was dead");
    *pDone = true;  // 停止转发
  }
}

广播流程:

  1. 检测到节点超时(60秒)时，本地RAS线程宣告节点死亡
  2. 创建RAS_BC_DEADPEER广播消息
  3. 通过ring拓扑转发给所有节点
  4. 各节点收到后断开连接，更新死亡列表
  5. 已知死亡的节点不再转发，避免重复

6.3 Socket终止与重建 (rasnet.cc:478-557)

void rasSocketTerminate(struct rasSocket* sock, bool finalize, 
                        uint64_t startRetryOffset, bool retry) {
  if (sock->conn) {
    struct rasConnection* conn = sock->conn;
    
    // 1. 从连接中分离socket
    if (conn->sock == sock) {
      conn->sock = nullptr;
      
      // 2. 启动重试计时器
      if (retry) {
        int64_t now = clockNano();
        if (conn->startRetryTime == 0) {
          conn->startRetryTime = now - startRetryOffset;
        }
        conn->lastRetryTime = now;
      }
    } else {
      // Socket已被新连接替代，直接释放
      sock->conn = nullptr;
    }
  }
  
  // 3. 终止socket
  if (!finalize && sock->status == RAS_SOCK_READY) {
    // 优雅关闭: 只关闭发送方向，继续接收缓冲区数据
    if (shutdown(sock->sock.fd, SHUT_WR) != 0) {
      finalize = true;  // 失败则强制关闭
    } else {
      sock->lastSendTime = clockNano();
      sock->status = RAS_SOCK_TERMINATING;
    }
  } else {
    // 强制关闭
    (void)ncclSocketClose(&sock->sock);
    if (sock->pfd != -1) {
      rasPfds[sock->pfd].fd = -1;
      rasPfds[sock->pfd].events = 0;
    }
    free(sock->recvMsg);
    freeSockEntry(sock);
  }
}

七、集合操作

7.1 集合操作类型

1，广播操作 (< 1000):

    • RAS_BC_DEADPEER: 节点失效通知

2，收集操作 (>= 1001):

    • RAS_COLL_CONNS: 收集所有连接统计信息
    • RAS_COLL_COMMS: 收集所有通信器状态信息

7.2 集合操作流程 (collectives.cc)

ncclResult_t rasNetSendCollReq(const struct rasCollRequest* req, 
                                bool* pAllDone, 
                                struct rasCollective** pColl,
                                struct rasConnection* fromConn) {
  // 1. 创建集合操作跟踪结构
  struct rasCollective* coll;
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&coll, 1));
  
  memcpy(&coll->rootAddr, &req->rootAddr, sizeof(coll->rootAddr));
  coll->rootId = req->rootId;
  coll->type = req->type;
  coll->timeout = req->timeout;
  coll->startTime = clockNano();
  coll->fromConn = fromConn;
  
  // 2. 确定转发目标
  struct rasConnection* fwdConns[2] = {nullptr, nullptr};
  int nFwd = 0;
  
  // 查找next和prev链路的主连接
  if (rasNextLink.conns && rasNextLink.conns->conn) {
    if (rasNextLink.conns->conn != fromConn) {
      fwdConns[nFwd++] = rasNextLink.conns->conn;
    }
  }
  if (rasPrevLink.conns && rasPrevLink.conns->conn) {
    if (rasPrevLink.conns->conn != fromConn &&
        rasPrevLink.conns->conn != fwdConns[0]) {
      fwdConns[nFwd++] = rasPrevLink.conns->conn;
    }
  }
  
  // 3. 转发请求
  for (int i = 0; i < nFwd; i++) {
    struct rasMsg* msg;
    size_t msgLen = rasMsgLength(RAS_MSG_COLLREQ, req->type) + extraDataLen;
    NCCLCHECK(rasMsgAlloc(&msg, msgLen));
    
    msg->type = RAS_MSG_COLLREQ;
    memcpy(&msg->collReq, req, msgLen - offsetof(struct rasMsg, collReq));
    
    rasConnEnqueueMsg(fwdConns[i], msg, msgLen);
  }
  
  coll->fwdConns = fwdConns;
  coll->nFwdSent = nFwd;
  
  // 4. 收集本地数据
  NCCLCHECK(rasCollGatherLocalData(coll));
  
  // 5. 检查是否完成
  bool allDone = (coll->nFwdSent == 0);
  if (pAllDone) *pAllDone = allDone;
  if (pColl) *pColl = coll;
  
  // 6. 如果全部完成，发送响应
  if (allDone && fromConn) {
    NCCLCHECK(rasSendCollResp(coll, fromConn));
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

集合操作特点:

  • 沿ring双向转发，避免从原路返回
  • 超时控制: 单跳5秒 + 额外5秒 = 总计最多10秒
  • 支持部分失败: 记录nLegTimeouts表示不完整数据
  • 本地数据立即收集，无需等待转发完成

7.3 集合操作消息流图

Root Node initiates collective operation:
      +-----------+
      | Root Node |
      | (Node A)  |
      +-----+-----+
            |
            | RAS_MSG_COLLREQ
            v
    +---------------+
    | Next/Prev     |
    | Links         |
    +-------+-------+
            |
     +------+------+
     |             |
     v             v
+----------+  +----------+
| Node B   |  | Node N   |
|          |  |          |
| Process  |  | Process  |
| and      |  | and      |
| Forward  |  | Forward  |
+----+-----+  +-----+----+
     |             |
     | RAS_MSG_COLLREQ
     |             |
     v             v
+----------+  +----------+
| Node C   |  | Node ... |
|          |  |          |
| Process  |  | Process  |
| and      |  | and      |
| Send     |  | Send     |
| Response |  | Response |
+----+-----+  +-----+----+
     |             |
     | RAS_MSG_COLLRESP
     |             |
     v             v
    +-------+-------+
    | Next/Prev     |
    | Links         |
    +-------+-------+
            |
            | RAS_MSG_COLLRESP
            v
      +-----+-----+
      | Root Node |
      | (Node A)  |
      | Aggregate |
      | Responses |
      +-----------+
            |
            | Send final result
            v
      +-----------+
      | RAS Client|
      +-----------+

7.3 响应聚合 (collectives.cc)

ncclResult_t rasMsgHandleCollResp(struct rasMsg* msg, struct rasSocket* sock) {
  struct rasCollResponse* resp = &msg->collResp;
  
  // 1. 查找对应的集合操作
  struct rasCollective* coll = rasCollFindByRootId(resp->rootAddr, resp->rootId);
  if (!coll) {
    INFO(NCCL_RAS, "RAS received unexpected collResp");
    return ncclSuccess;
  }
  
  // 2. 标记该连接的响应已收到
  for (int i = 0; i < coll->nFwdSent; i++) {
    if (coll->fwdConns[i] == sock->conn) {
      coll->fwdConns[i] = nullptr;
      coll->nFwdRecv++;
      break;
    }
  }
  
  // 3. 合并响应数据
  coll->nLegTimeouts += resp->nLegTimeouts;
  
  // 合并peers列表
  for (int i = 0; i < resp->nPeers; i++) {
    if (!rasPeerInList(coll->peers, coll->nPeers, &resp->peers[i])) {
      NCCLCHECK(ncclRealloc(&coll->peers, coll->nPeers, coll->nPeers+1));
      memcpy(&coll->peers[coll->nPeers++], &resp->peers[i], sizeof(resp->peers[i]));
    }
  }
  
  // 合并特定类型的数据(CONNS/COMMS)
  NCCLCHECK(rasCollMergeData(coll, resp));
  
  // 4. 检查是否全部完成
  if (coll->nFwdRecv == coll->nFwdSent) {
    if (coll->fromConn) {
      // 中间节点: 向上游发送聚合响应
      NCCLCHECK(rasSendCollResp(coll, coll->fromConn));
      rasCollFree(coll);
    } else {
      // 根节点: 通知等待的客户端
      NCCLCHECK(rasClientResume(coll));
    }
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

八、客户端接口

8.1 客户端协议 (client.cc)

客户端通过TCP连接到RAS端口(默认28028)，使用文本协议交互:

客户端 -> RAS: CLIENT PROTOCOL 2\n
RAS -> 客户端: SERVER PROTOCOL 2\n

客户端 -> RAS: TIMEOUT 10\n           # 可选
RAS -> 客户端: OK\n

客户端 -> RAS: SET FORMAT json\n     # 可选
RAS -> 客户端: OK\n

客户端 -> RAS: [VERBOSE] STATUS\n
RAS -> 客户端: <状态数据...>\n[EOF]

8.2 客户端-服务器交互图

+----------------+                          +----------------+
|   RAS Client   |                          |   RAS Server   |
+--------+-------+                          +--------+-------+
         |                                           |
         | 1. TCP Connection                     +---v---+
         +------------------------------------->| Listen|
         |                                       +---+---+
         |                                           |
         | 2. Protocol Negotiation               +---v---+
         | CLIENT PROTOCOL 2 -------------------->| Handle|
         | SERVER PROTOCOL 2 <-------------------| Client|
         |                                       +---+---+
         |                                           |
         | 3. Optional Settings                  +---v---+
         | TIMEOUT 10 --------------------------->| Handle|
         | OK <---------------------------------| Timeout|
         |                                       +---+---+
         | SET FORMAT json --------------------->| Handle|
         | OK <---------------------------------| Format|
         |                                       +---+---+
         | 4. Status Request                     +---v---+
         | VERBOSE STATUS ----------------------->| Handle|
         |                                       | Request|
         |                                       +---+---+
         | 5. Data Collection                +-------v-------+
         |                                   | Collect Data  |
         |                                   | (Collectives) |
         |                                   +-------+-------+
         |                                           |
         | 6. Response Formatting            +-------v-------+
         |                                   | Format Data   |
         |                                   | (Text/JSON)   |
         |                                   +-------+-------+
         |                                           |
         | 7. Send Response                      +---v---+
         | <状态数据...> ------------------------| Send  |
         | [EOF] <------------------------------| Data  |
         |                                       +---+---+
         |                                           |
         | 8. Close Connection                   +---v---+
         +------------------------------------->| Close |
                                                 +-------+

8.2 状态查询 (client_support.cc)

RAS支持两种输出格式: TEXT格式 (默认):

NCCL Processes: 8
  Host        PID      CUDA Devs  NVML Devs
  node1       12345    0,1        0,1
  node2       12346    0,1        0,1
  ...

Communicators: 2
  Comm 0: hash 0x123... nRanks 8
    Rank 0: host node1, cudaDev 0, nvmlDev 0, state OK
    Rank 1: host node1, cudaDev 1, nvmlDev 1, state OK
    ...

JSON格式:

{
  "processes": [
    {"host": "node1", "pid": 12345, "cudaDevs": [0,1], "nvmlDevs": [0,1]},
    ...
  ],
  "communicators": [
    {
      "commHash": "0x123...",
      "nRanks": 8,
      "ranks": [
        {"rank": 0, "host": "node1", "cudaDev": 0, "state": "OK"},
        ...
      ]
    }
  ],
  "connections": {
    "totalConns": 16,
    "travelTimeMin": 123456,
    "travelTimeMax": 234567,
    "negativeMins": []
  }
}

8.3 客户端工具使用

# 基本查询
nccl-ras-client

# 指定主机和端口
nccl-ras-client -h node1 -p 28028

# 详细输出
nccl-ras-client -v

# JSON格式
nccl-ras-client -f json

# 自定义超时
nccl-ras-client -t 15

九、关键特性

9.1 引用计数与生命周期

// 进程级引用计数
static int rasInitRefCount = 0;

// Comm初始化时增加
ncclAtomicRefCountIncrement(&rasInitRefCount);

// Comm销毁时减少
ncclAtomicRefCountDecrement(&rasInitRefCount);

// 进程退出时统一清理
atexit(rasTerminate);

9.2 消息队列与异步发送

// 消息入队
void rasConnEnqueueMsg(struct rasConnection* conn, struct rasMsg* msg, 
                        size_t msgLen, bool front) {
  struct rasMsgMeta* meta = getMeta(msg);
  meta->enqueueTime = clockNano();
  meta->offset = 0;
  meta->length = msgLen;
  
  if (front)
    ncclIntruQueueEnqueueFront(&conn->sendQ, meta);
  else
    ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&conn->sendQ, meta);
  
  // 如果socket就绪，启用POLLOUT
  if (conn->sock && conn->sock->status == RAS_SOCK_READY) {
    rasPfds[conn->sock->pfd].events |= POLLOUT;
  }
}

// 异步发送
ncclResult_t rasConnSendMsg(struct rasConnection* conn, int* closed, bool* allSent) {
  while ((meta = ncclIntruQueueHead(&conn->sendQ)) != nullptr) {
    // 1. 发送消息长度
    if (meta->offset < sizeof(meta->length)) {
      NCCLCHECK(ncclSocketProgress(NCCL_SOCKET_SEND, &conn->sock->sock, 
                                   &meta->length, sizeof(meta->length),
                                   &meta->offset, closed));
      if (*closed || meta->offset < sizeof(meta->length)) break;
    }
    
    // 2. 发送消息体
    NCCLCHECK(ncclSocketProgress(NCCL_SOCKET_SEND, &conn->sock->sock, 
                                 &meta->msg, meta->length,
                                 &meta->offset, closed));
    if (*closed || meta->offset < meta->length+sizeof(meta->length)) break;
    
    // 3. 完成，出队并释放
    ncclIntruQueueDequeue(&conn->sendQ);
    free(meta);
  }
  
  *allSent = !meta;
  return ncclSuccess;
}

9.3 连接优先级策略

// 连接建立规则: 地址较小的一方主动发起
if (ncclSocketsCompare(&rasNetListeningSocket.addr, &peerAddr) < 0) {
  // 我方地址较小，主动连接
  NCCLCHECK(rasConnCreate(&peerAddr, &conn));
} else {
  // 对方地址较小，等待连接
  // 创建占位符，不立即连接
  NCCLCHECK(rasLinkConnAdd(link, nullptr, peerIdx, ...));
}

优势:

  • 避免双向同时连接导致的资源浪费
  • 减少连接竞争和冲突
  • 故障恢复时保持一致性

9.4 版本检测

// 连接初始化时检查NCCL版本
if (msg->connInit.ncclVersion != NCCL_VERSION_CODE) {
  WARN("NCCL version mismatch with remote peer %s (local: %d, remote %d)",
       ncclSocketToString(&sock->sock.addr, rasLine), 
       NCCL_VERSION_CODE, msg->connInit.ncclVersion);
  rasNetSendNack(sock);
  rasSocketTerminate(sock, /*finalize*/true);
  return ncclInvalidUsage;
}

9.5 哈希优化

// Peers列表哈希
uint64_t rasPeersHash;
uint64_t rasDeadPeersHash;

// 保活消息中携带哈希
msg->keepAlive.peersHash = rasPeersHash;
msg->keepAlive.deadPeersHash = rasDeadPeersHash;

// 哈希不匹配时才交换完整peers列表
if (msg->keepAlive.peersHash != rasPeersHash || 
    msg->keepAlive.deadPeersHash != rasDeadPeersHash) {
  NCCLCHECK(rasConnSendPeersUpdate(conn, rasPeers, nRasPeers));
}

效果:

  • 减少网络传输: 哈希仅8字节，完整列表可能数KB
  • 快速一致性检查: O(1)复杂度
  • 仅在不一致时同步: 节省带宽

十、调试与监控

10.1 日志输出

# 启用RAS日志
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=RAS

# 调整超时因子(用于调试)
export NCCL_RAS_TIMEOUT_FACTOR=2  # 所有超时翻倍

关键日志示例:

[RAS] RAS network listening socket at 192.168.1.10:45678
[RAS] RAS handling connInit from 192.168.1.11:45679
[RAS] RAS connect timeout warning (5s) on socket connection with 192.168.1.12:45680
[RAS] RAS link 1: opening fallback connection 1 with 192.168.1.13:45681
[RAS] RAS peer dead timeout error (60s) with 192.168.1.12:45680
[RAS] RAS handling deadPeer (addr 192.168.1.12:45680)

10.2 统计信息

// 连接往返时间统计
struct rasConnection {
  int64_t travelTimeMin;   // 最小往返时间
  int64_t travelTimeMax;   // 最大往返时间
  int64_t travelTimeSum;   // 总往返时间
  int64_t travelTimeCount; // 采样次数
};

// 通过客户端查询
$ nccl-ras-client -v
Connections:
  Total: 16
  Travel Time: min=123us max=456us avg=234us
  Negative Min Connections: 0

10.3 环境变量

# RAS监听地址(格式: host:port)
export NCCL_RAS_ADDR=192.168.1.10:28028

# 超时系数
export NCCL_RAS_TIMEOUT_FACTOR=1

# 禁用RAS(不推荐)
# (无专门环境变量，通过不初始化实现)

十一、典型故障场景

11.1 网络抖动

现象:

[RAS] RAS connect timeout warning (5s) on socket with 192.168.1.11
[RAS] RAS link 1: opening fallback connection 1 with 192.168.1.12

处理:

  1. 5秒警告后启动fallback连接
  2. 继续尝试重连主连接
  3. 使用fallback进行通信
  4. 主连接恢复后继续使用，保留fallback作为备份

恢复时间: 5秒检测 + 1秒建立fallback = 6秒

11.2 节点失效

现象:

[RAS] RAS peer dead timeout error (60s) with 192.168.1.11
[RAS] Broadcasting deadPeer 192.168.1.11
[RAS] RAS handling deadPeer (addr 192.168.1.11)  # 其他节点

处理:

  1. 60秒无响应后宣告死亡
  2. 广播通知所有节点
  3. 所有节点断开与该节点的连接
  4. 更新路由表，绕过失效节点

影响: 依赖该节点的通信器将报错，需要应用层处理

11.3 部分网络分区

现象:

节点A ←→ 节点B  (正常)
节点B ←→ 节点C  (正常)
节点A  ×  节点C  (分区)

处理:

  1. A和C互相检测不到，但都能连接B
  2. 集合操作通过B中继完成
  3. 客户端查询显示连接拓扑异常
  4. nLegTimeouts > 0表示部分数据不完整

11.4 Socket资源耗尽

现象:

[RAS] socket: Too many open files
[RAS] RAS trying to reconnect with 192.168.1.11

处理:

  1. 空闲连接60秒后自动关闭
  2. 优先保留主连接和活跃fallback
  3. 外部fallback标记为低优先级
  4. 必要时强制关闭最老的空闲连接

十二、总结

NCCL RAS系统通过以下机制实现高可靠性:

  1. 多层超时策略: 从1秒保活到60秒失效判定，逐级处理
  2. 主动故障检测: 保活消息、超时监控、连接状态机
  3. 自动故障转移: Fallback连接、ring绕路、节点隔离
  4. 全局一致性: 广播机制确保所有节点同步死亡列表
  5. 可观测性: 客户端工具、统计信息、详细日志
  6. 资源管理: 引用计数、连接复用、空闲回收
  7. 异步设计: 非阻塞I/O、事件驱动、独立线程

适用场景:

  • 大规模分布式训练(百节点以上)
  • 不可靠网络环境(公有云、跨数据中心)
  • 长时间运行任务(需要容忍瞬时故障)
  • 需要运行时诊断和监控的生产环境

限制:

  • 仅检测RAS网络层故障，不检测NCCL通信层故障
  • 节点失效后需要应用层重新初始化通信器
  • 60秒失效判定时间较长，不适合低延迟场景
  • 内存开销: 每进程一个RAS线程 + 连接管理数据结构

十三、 版权申明
